V5 regression (P 0.895→0.768, F1 0.737) root cause: a large batch of new positive data was injected into training all at once instead of through the disciplined per-batch HITL review loop; the unreviewed bulk batch carried unlabelled drones that V5 fired on and was scored against as FP. claim: Two-verifier fusion (RGB mlp_v5 + IR mlp_v5_ir_aligned), TRUST-FIRST order: trust classifier routes (sa32 or its replacement), then the trusted modality's verifier runs (IR always-on, viable because aligned IR verifier is recall-safe). reject_both->drop; trust_rgb->keep iff RGB verifier passes; trust_ir->keep iff IR verifier passes; trust_both conflict resolved by the router's SOFT modality scores: keep iff (s_rgb*p_rgb + s_ir*p_ir)/(s_rgb+s_ir) >= tau. Classifier-agnostic. Single-modality + grayscale-fallback paths run only that modality's branch.

Classifier picks trusted modality; MLP verifies ONLY trusted modality; trust re-derived (fully-vetoed trusted modality loses trust). trust_both conflict = per-modality (recall-first OR-survive); cross-modal soft-weight NOT implemented (needs box matching) - optional future. Single global OOD tau does NOT transfer across surfaces. REVISED REC: size-aware threshold (log_area clean, no blanket release) or targeted dronediv re-mine > blanket fail-open; fail-open ok only with per-surface tau / low-clutter data. hook pyside_engine _mlp_gate_open. figs failopen_*.png. doc docs/analysis/2026-06-01_mlp_v5_recall_drop_mri.md

claim: The verifier P(drone) (MLP on YOLO P3/P5 backbone) is a strong, non-redundant trust-classifier feature on the RGB branch (AUROC 0.949 vs raw conf 0.842, +0.107 significant); the IR verifier is weak (thermal 0.60-0.76, gray 0.618). Grayscale is fixed via the always-available strong RGB verifier signal, NOT by rescuing the dead IR branch.

notes: Detection-level AUROC on offline caches (6167 dets, zero-GPU). RGB mlp_v5 0.949 [0.939,0.957] vs conf 0.842, lift +0.107 CIs disjoint, rho 0.64 (non-redundant); svan confuser-rejection 0.970. thermal-IR aligned 0.813 pooled but 0.60-0.76 per-surface, neg pool only 97. gray-IR aligned_gray 0.618 [0.571,0.664] BEATS chance-level conf 0.535 (confirms ir_max_conf gray collapse) but weak; gray lift CIs slightly overlap (indicative). CAVEATS: pooled>per-surface ~0.05-0.10 cross-surface inflation; mlp_v5 in-sample risk on selcom/svan -> Phase1 grouped-CV is real test; gray n=562 small. Verifier-as-FEATURE preserves classifier->filter order (score=evidence not a filter decision). claim: rgb_blurriness (the forward-sweep's top pick) is a CORPUS ARTIFACT: pooled AUROC 0.872 but within-source mean 0.516 (chance; every video_drone clip exactly 0.500, antiuav 0.419). Its gain is cross-clip (which video) not drone-vs-reject. REJECTED. Within-source AUROC catches what leakage_ratio (0.058) missed.
thesis_contribution: Method refinement: within-source AUROC is a complementary artifact test to leakage_ratio (leakage measures within-class variation; the artifact was a cross-clip mean shift). MI(nonlinear) surfaced free cross-modal diff features (area_diff/conf_diff/pos_euclidean_diff) as untested high-value candidates.

claim: V5 MLP verifier features must be scored/stored in float32; float16 caching saturates P(drone) to exactly 0.0000 for EVERY detection (the input scaler divides by tiny per-feature std, so f16 rounding is amplified to net saturation). imgsz is NOT the cause: f32 mlp_v5 gives P0.99 on Anti-UAV at both 640 and 1280.
notes: Bit eval/pipeline_cache_paired.py v1 (cached feats as f16) -> all-zero RGB filter across the Anti-UAV/Svan email recompute. Fix: store f32 + precompute P(drone) at cache time. PySide GUI unaffected (scores live in f32, any imgsz). Svan still needs imgsz 1280 (f32@640 -> P0.04, drones unresolvable).

claim: robust8 (= robust6 + rgb_mean_conf + is_grayscale, 8 free conf+geometry feats) closes robust6 grayscale trust_rgb hole via a per-class trust_rgb decision threshold. Full-pipeline clf->filter on svanstrom_gray: recall 0.577->0.738 (tau0.10) / 0.681 (tau0.20) at ~unchanged precision 0.91, thermal F1 tie ~0.98, AND lower rgb_confuser FP (0.020->0.013). Mechanism: argmax suppresses the rare trust_rgb class; rgb_mean_conf separates drone-from-confuser at AUROC 0.934 on the IR-blind XOR slice; the threshold cashes that separability into recall.
